name: PickList
description: Two-column shuttle picker — move items between lists.

api.name: PickList
api.description: Two-column shuttle picker — move items between lists.

parameters.name: Items
parameters.description: The full candidate set. Items present in SelectedItems render in the target panel; the rest render in the source panel.

parameters.name: SelectedItems
parameters.description: The items currently in the target panel, in display order. Bind via @bind-SelectedItems to receive reorders and moves.

parameters.name: SelectedItemsChanged
parameters.description: Raised whenever the target panel's contents or order changes — moves between panels, and (when Reorderable) in-panel reordering.

parameters.name: ItemTemplate
parameters.description: Optional custom render fragment for a row's content in both panels. Defaults to item.ToString().

parameters.name: SourceTitle
parameters.description: Source panel header. Defaults to the localized "Available".

parameters.name: TargetTitle
parameters.description: Target panel header. Defaults to the localized "Selected".

parameters.name: ShowSearch
parameters.description: When true (default), each panel shows a search box that filters its rows by ToString() substring match.

parameters.name: Reorderable
parameters.description: When true (default), the target list can be reordered: header up/down buttons and Alt+ArrowUp/ArrowDown on a focused target item move the selected items within the target order, emitting SelectedItemsChanged. Reorder is gated while a target search is active (a filtered view has no stable order to shuffle).

parameters.name: Height
parameters.description: CSS height applied to both panels' scrollable list area (default "320px").

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root grid container.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root grid container.

events.name: SelectedItemsChanged
events.description: Raised whenever the target panel's contents or order changes — moves between panels, and (when Reorderable) in-panel reordering.

examples.title: Strings
examples.code:
<PickList TItem="string"
          Items="_allDepartments"
          SelectedItems="_pickedDepartments"
          SelectedItemsChanged="OnDepartmentsChanged"
          SourceTitle="All Departments"
          TargetTitle="Assigned" />

examples.title: Typed Records with Item Template
examples.code: @context.Name @context.Email

examples.title: No Search, Not Reorderable
examples.code:
<PickList TItem="string"
          Items="_allDepartments"
          SelectedItems="_picked"
          SelectedItemsChanged="OnChanged"
          ShowSearch="false"
          Reorderable="false"
          Height="220px"
          SourceTitle="All Departments"
          TargetTitle="Assigned" />

slots.name: ItemTemplate
slots.description: Optional custom render fragment for a row's content in both panels. Defaults to item.ToString().

mdSummary:
# PickList

Two-column shuttle picker — move items between lists.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Dashboard
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/pick-list

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| PickList | Items | `IEnumerable<TItem>` | `[]` | The full candidate set. Items present in SelectedItems render in the target panel; the rest render in the source panel. |
| PickList | SelectedItems | `IEnumerable<TItem>` | `[]` | The items currently in the target panel, in display order. Bind via @bind-SelectedItems to receive reorders and moves. |
| PickList | SelectedItemsChanged | `EventCallback<IEnumerable<TItem>>` | `` | Raised whenever the target panel's contents or order changes — moves between panels, and (when Reorderable) in-panel reordering. |
| PickList | ItemTemplate | `RenderFragment<TItem>?` | `` | Optional custom render fragment for a row's content in both panels. Defaults to item.ToString(). |
| PickList | SourceTitle | `string?` | `` | Source panel header. Defaults to the localized "Available". |
| PickList | TargetTitle | `string?` | `` | Target panel header. Defaults to the localized "Selected". |
| PickList | ShowSearch | `bool` | `true` | When true (default), each panel shows a search box that filters its rows by ToString() substring match. |
| PickList | Reorderable | `bool` | `true` | When true (default), the target list can be reordered: header up/down buttons and Alt+ArrowUp/ArrowDown on a focused target item move the selected items within the target order, emitting SelectedItemsChanged. Reorder is gated while a target search is active (a filtered view has no stable order to shuffle). |
| PickList | Height | `string` | `"320px"` | CSS height applied to both panels' scrollable list area (default "320px"). |
| PickList | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root grid container. |
| PickList | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root grid container. |

## Slots
- `ItemTemplate` (PickList) — Optional custom render fragment for a row's content in both panels. Defaults to item.ToString().

## Events
- `SelectedItemsChanged` (`EventCallback<IEnumerable<TItem>>`) — Raised whenever the target panel's contents or order changes — moves between panels, and (when Reorderable) in-panel reordering.

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)
- `IComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
- `ArrowDown` — HandleSourceKeyDown handles ArrowDown in PickList.razor
- `ArrowUp` — HandleSourceKeyDown handles ArrowUp in PickList.razor
- `Home` — HandleSourceKeyDown handles Home in PickList.razor
- `End` — HandleSourceKeyDown handles End in PickList.razor
- `ArrowUp` — HandleTargetKeyDown handles ArrowUp in PickList.razor
- `ArrowDown` — HandleTargetKeyDown handles ArrowDown in PickList.razor
- `Home` — HandleTargetKeyDown handles Home in PickList.razor
- `End` — HandleTargetKeyDown handles End in PickList.razor

## Example
```razor
<PickList />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-background`, `--color-border`, `--color-card`, `--color-input`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/PickList/PickList.razor`
